title: Garlicky Cheddar Salad
description: A simple and delicious salad with a garlicky twist, featuring crumbly cheddar cheese and a hint of Kenyan spice.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use a mild Kenyan pepper for a subtle flavor

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens salad and croutons.
2. Sprinkle the garlicky cheddar cheese over the salad.
3. Add the Kenyan pepper and garlic powder on top of the cheese.
4. Toss the salad gently to combine all the ingredients.
